evals.prompt: Build a full country economic report for Indonesia.
evals.expected_output: A config.yaml is created at report/country_report/Indonesia/, GTA trade tables are generated, CEIC series are resolved and pinned, viz-expert charts are produced under output/chart/country_report/Indonesia/, and a structured report.md follows the canonical section order with proper figure/table captions and an appendix. Missing series are skipped with a note rather than hunted.

evals.prompt: Update the Indonesia economic report and add a country-specific section on palm oil exports (Indonesia is the world's largest producer).
evals.expected_output: Existing config.yaml is reused (pinned series IDs not re-searched); a custom_sections block for palm oil is added and rendered as a subsection; only the affected parts change.

evals.prompt: I need a macro brief on Vietnam's economy for our regional outlook.
evals.expected_output: Triggers the skill for a new country (Vietnam): fresh config.yaml with iso3 VHM... resolved, sections built per the canonical structure, skip rule applied to unavailable series.
